title: Contribution Guidelines
content:
# Contribution Guide

Thank you for your interest in the Kecare project!

Lazy meow, I'll write later.

## Acknowledgements

Thanks to all the developers who have contributed to Kecare!

Your every contribution makes this project better.

Contribution Process:

1. Fork the project
2. Create a branch
3. Make modifications
4. Submit a PR
5. Wait for review

We look forward to your contributions! 🎉
